landing.title: SPEAK YOUR ITHACA
landing.prompt: What are you trying to return to—a person, a place, a promise, or a part of yourself?
landing.label: YOUR ITHACA
landing.placeholder: For example: my family, my courage, a life that feels like mine…
landing.stakes: Your words will travel with you—and return to you at the end.

island.label: THE SHORE ASKS
island.question: What will you carry from the city of ash?
